nasb.text: After they had mocked Him, they took the scarlet robe off Him and put His own garments back on Him, and led Him away to crucify Him.

esv.text: And when they had mocked him, they stripped him of the robe and put his own clothes on him and led him away to crucify him.

cnv.text: 戲弄完了，就脫下他的外袍，給他穿回自己的衣服，帶去釘十字架。

ccb.text: 他们戏弄完了，就脱去祂的袍子，给祂穿上原来的衣服，把祂押出去钉十字架。

csbs.text: 他们戏弄完了，就脱下他深红色的袍子，给他穿上他自己的衣服，然后把他带走，要钉上十字架。
